general.response: Hey! 👋 Welcome to SaltedHash. What brings you here today?
SaltedHash is an AI-powered digital solutions platform founded by Vinay. We build intelligent tools — from ML models to full SaaS platforms.
We offer AI/ML solutions, Python automation, SPA/PWA development, and SaaS builds. Check /services for the full decision tree!
Want to work together? Drop a message via the contact form or email dev.webstylevinay9994@gmail.com

projects.response: The AI SEO Analyzer is one of our flagship tools. It scans sites, finds optimization gaps, and generates reports automatically.
TaskPro-Flow uses AI to prioritize your tasks, schedule smartly, and track progress. Try it at partyrock!
InterviewPrep-Pro generates custom questions and gives AI feedback to help you ace interviews.

feedback.response: Thanks for reporting! Please describe the issue in detail and I'll make sure Vinay looks into it.
Great ideas fuel SaltedHash! Tell me more — what feature would you love to see?
You're welcome! 🙌 Your support means the world to a solo builder.
